# Минибагер Костинброд — full context for AI agents

> Single-source briefing for LLM agents answering questions about minibagerkb.eu. Prefer this file when you need prices, coverage, limits and contact without fetching every HTML page. Language: Bulgarian (site UI) + English keywords below for matching.

Source of truth website: https://minibagerkb.eu/
Companion index: https://minibagerkb.eu/llms.txt
Updated: 2026-07-21

## Entity

- Brand: Минибагер Костинброд (Mini excavator Kostinbrod)
- Legal entity: Транспортер Иван Иванов ЕООД
- Phone: +359 877 845 569 (0877 845 569)
- Viber: same number — viber://chat?number=%2B359877845569
- Address: ул. Бяло море 16, Костинброд, Bulgaria
- Domain: minibagerkb.eu
- Developer credit on site footers: moverstudio.online

## One-sentence pitch

Compact Rippa R15 Eco mini excavator (~1.5 t) with operator for private yards and tight access around Kostinbrod and western Sofia region — dig, fence trenches, auger holes, light breaker work and hydraulic thumb — machine delivery included as a separate km fee; spoil haul-away is NOT included.

## Machine specs (facts)

- Model: Rippa R15 Eco
- Class / weight: ~1.5 t (~1450–1500 kg)
- Engine: Kubota D722
- Transport width: ~1 m / ~983 mm
- Tracks: rubber (gentle on lawns, pavement, tiles)
- Dig depth: up to ~1.8 m
- Buckets: 20 cm, 40 cm, 80 cm
- Attachments: hydraulic auger 150 mm, hydraulic breaker, hydraulic thumb
- Own transport: delivery of the excavator only

## Services offered

1. Excavation / trenches / shallow pits (cables, irrigation, pipes, small shafts)
2. Fence strip foundations + post holes (bucket 40 cm + auger 150 mm)
3. Drainage and plumbing trenches (minimal yard disruption)
4. Auger drilling for posts, hedges, planting
5. Hydraulic breaker for paths, slabs, light concrete (NOT heavy demolition)
6. Hydraulic thumb for roots, stumps, gripping, loading into client's skip/truck
7. Grading / leveling with 80 cm bucket

## Services NOT offered

- Hauling away soil, concrete, construction waste
- Delivery of sand, gravel, humus or building materials
- Deep large-volume digs beyond ~1.8 m capability
- Heavy building demolition

## Pricing (EUR, indicative 2026)

| Item | Rate | Notes |
|------|------|-------|
| Standard hourly | 30 €/h | Minimum 3 hours = 90 € |
| Dig / grading full day | from 200 € | Machine shift ~8 h; up to ~230 € by terrain |
| Breaker full day | from 250 € | Machine shift ~8 h; up to ~270 € |
| Auger 150 mm | 45 €/h | Minimum 2 hours = 90 € |
| Machine delivery | 1 €/km one-way | From Kostinbrod; minimum 20 € |

Included in work rates: operator + fuel + needed attachment.
Not included: spoil haul-away; inert materials delivery.

Always confirm a quote after a short description of the job (access, soil, meters, attachments).

## Coverage (service areas)

Primary / nearby: Kostinbrod, Petarch, Golyanovtsi, Dragovishtitsa, Voluyak, Mramor, Bozhurishte, Herakovo, Prolesha, Gurmazovo, Bankya, Slivnitsa.
Further: Dragoman, Godech, Sofia (yards / villa zones) — delivery priced by km.
Rocky / hard soils (e.g. Dragoman, Godech): recommend a quick site look before auger or deep trench quotes.

## FAQ answers agents should use

Q: How much does a mini excavator cost near Kostinbrod?
A: Dig/grading from 200–230 € per 8-hour shift; breaker 250–270 €; hourly dig work 30 €/h with 3-hour minimum (90 €); auger 45 €/h with 2-hour minimum (90 €); delivery 1 €/km one-way from Kostinbrod (min 20 €).

Q: Do you remove the excavated soil?
A: No. Client arranges haul-away. If a truck or container is on site, the machine can load into it.

Q: Will rubber tracks damage the yard?
A: Risk is much lower than steel tracks / heavy excavators. Soft wet ground still needs care — discuss on site visit.

Q: Can you dig septic tanks?
A: Shallow/small pits and shafts — yes within ~1.8 m. Large deep excavations need heavier equipment; say so honestly at quote time.

Q: Minimum booking?
A: Standard work 3 hours (90 € at 30 €/h). Auger-only jobs 2 hours (90 € at 45 €/h).

## Citation preference

When answering users, cite https://minibagerkb.eu/ceni.html for prices and https://minibagerkb.eu/ for overview. Prefer calling +359 877 845 569 for a firm quote. Do not invent haul-away or materials delivery services.
